attributes.description: L&T Finance Ltd. is a NBFC, offering a range of financial products and services. [1] Company has filed requisite application for necessary registration as Systemically Important Non- Deposit Accepting Core Investment Company (NBFC-CIC)[2]

L&T Finance Ltd. is a NBFC, offering a range of financial products and services. [1] Company has filed requisite application for necessary registration as Systemically Important Non- Deposit Accepting Core Investment Company (NBFC-CIC)[2]
